sources.use: artifact verification produces a verifier result that must remain inspectable
verification must bind policy evaluation to a specific artifact subject
machine-readable closed contract for receipt structure

finding: Safe status mapping is insufficient without a receipt that records the exact check, verifier identity and invocation, immutable subject digest, observation time, raw evidence reference, uncertainty, and falsification route.
uncertainty: The contract is verifier-neutral and has not yet been exercised against live gh or Cloudflare verifier output.

verification.source_review: Committed test file was fetched back from the default branch and contains five deterministic cases.
verification.runtime: not executed in this connector-only run

falsification_route: Reject the design if malformed digests, missing evidence references, unknown status aliases, or absent verifier metadata pass validation; also reject if a receipt is later treated as proof of the underlying claim rather than an audit record of a verifier result.
